title: codex-models response (v1.0.69)
description: Response shape of `sqlite-graphrag codex-models --json` and `codex-models --suggest <substring>`. Added in v1.0.69 as part of G33. Exposes the ChatGPT Pro OAuth model whitelist that enrich --mode codex validates against before spawning.

models.description: List of accepted model identifiers for ChatGPT Pro OAuth

default.description: Model used when --codex-model is not passed

count.description: Number of models in the whitelist (== models.length)

suggestion.description: When invoked with --suggest <substring>, the closest match by substring or Levenshtein; null when --suggest absent
